extraction.one_line_summary: MARTIN Dan attacked 4.5km from summit at Val Morelle, gained 15 seconds immediately, held off THOMAS Geraint's final-kilometer surge by 4 seconds.
tactical_patterns: MARTIN Dan exploited lower GC position to escape Team Sky's watch at 4.5km, gaining immediate 15-second gap before counterattack.
Team Sky controlled three-minute break throughout valley, revealing they prioritize tempo suppression over allowing GC-safe escape artist freedom.
THOMAS Geraint's late-kilometer surge failed by mere 4 seconds, suggesting Sky prioritized jersey transfer over committing earlier to chase.
MOSCON Gianni lost leader's jersey despite team control, indicating Sky willingness to swap yellow internally when stronger rider emerges.

rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: positive: First stage win since 2014 Beijing despite strong 2017/2016 Dauphiné podiums suggests prior year form-without-results pattern broken.
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: Took yellow with comfortable 1:09 gap despite losing stage, 4-second deficit shows strongest Sky rider emerged on climb.
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: Third place on podium suggests holding form against GC favorites on steep 7% sustained gradients.
rider_signals.CARUSO Damiano: neutral: Second overall at 1:09 indicates solid position but no capacity to follow sharp MARTIN acceleration.
rider_signals.MOSCON Gianni: negative: Dropped when MARTIN attacked at 4.5km, lost yellow despite team controlling race, reveals limitations on steep gradients.
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: Yielded 16 seconds on home climb after being mentioned as favorite, signals concerning weakness before mountain stages.
